source.sourcePath: raw/sources/DHF (인허가)/07_(CYAN) GT1717C, GT1717CP/91_인증 - 국내/참고 - 성능시험성적서 첨부자료 2,3G series/[2,3G series] 성능시험성적서 (A-PTR-23G).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Performance test report for the HnX-R1 medical image acquisition device 2/3G series detectors.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents performance verification results and confirms that the HnX-R1 2/3G series performance settings had no abnormality.
keyPoints: The report covers A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW 2/3G series detector ref numbers.

All summarized test items are marked PASS, including sensor type, scintillator, pixel characteristics, MTF, DQE, sensitivity, energy range, A/D conversion, wireless standard, IP range, communication, and trigger modes.
The conclusion states that the medical image acquisition device model HnX-R1, 2/3G series, had no abnormality in performance setting values.

evidence.claim: The document is Doc No. A-PTR-23G, Rev. No. 0, issued on 2025.07.18.
evidence.evidenceText: Doc No. A-PTR-23G Rev. No. 0 Issue date 2025.07.18

evidence.claim: The revision history records Rev. 0 as first establishment on 2025.07.18.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev. No. Issue date Note 0 2025.07.18 First establishment

evidence.claim: The report is for performance confirmation of the HnX-R1 2/3G series detector.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 시험 성적서는 의료영상획득장치 (HnX-R1)의 2/3G series 디텍터 성능 확인을 위한 시험성적서이다.

evidence.claim: The tested item is a medical image acquisition device with model name HnX-R1.
evidence.evidenceText: (1) 품목명: 의료영상획득장치 (2) 모델명: HnX-R1

evidence.claim: The 2/3G series test ref models are A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: (2/3G series) A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW

evidence.claim: The test period was 2025.07.14 to 2025.07.18.
The test location was H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do.
evidence.evidenceText: (2) 시험장소: ㈜에이치앤아비즈 (경기도 용인시 처인구 처인성로41-16 2동 1층일부)

evidence.claim: Sensor type testing for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW passed against PIN-TFT / Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW Sensor Type (센서 타입 확인) PIN-TFT / Flexible PIN-TFT (a-Si, IGZO) 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Scintillator verification for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW passed with CsI as the criterion.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW, A1417MCW, F1417MCW Scintillator 확인 CsI 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: A1717MCW total pixel number criterion is at least 3072 x 3072 pixels and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW Total Pixel Number 3072 x 3072 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: A1417MCW and F1417MCW total pixel number criterion is at least 2560 x 3072 pixels and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: A1417MCW, F1417MCW 2560 x 3072 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: A1717MCW total pixel area criterion is 430 x 430 mm within ±10% and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW Total Pixel Area 확인 430 x 430mm ± 10% 이내 ... PASS

evidence.claim: A1417MCW and F1417MCW total pixel area criterion is 358.4 x 430 mm within ±10% and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: A1417MCW, F1417MCW 358.4 x 430mm ± 10% 이내 ... PASS

evidence.claim: A1717MCW effective pixel number criterion is at least 3036 x 3040 pixels and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW Effective Pixel Number 확인 3036 x 3040 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: A1417MCW and F1417MCW effective pixel number criterion is at least 2466 x 3040 pixels and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: A1417MCW, F1417MCW 2466 x 3040 pixels 이상 ... PASS

evidence.claim: The common pixel pitch criterion is 140 μm ±10% and passed.
evidence.evidenceText: 공통 Pixel pitch 140μm ± 10% ... PASS

evidence.claim: MTF testing for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW passed using RQA5 beam condition, 70 kV, 40 mAs, 21 mm Al filter, SID 150 cm.
evidence.evidenceText: MTF ... RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: DQE testing for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW passed using RQA5 beam condition, 70 kV, 40 mAs, 21 mm Al filter, SID 150 cm.
evidence.evidenceText: DQE ... RQA5 Beam condition, 70kV, 40mAs 21mm Al filter SID: 150cm PASS

evidence.claim: Sensitivity testing passed with a center criterion of at least 160 LSB/uGy and measured 165 LSB/uGy for A1717MCW, A1417MCW, and F1417MCW.
evidence.evidenceText: A1717MCW Center 기준 160 LSB/uGy 이상 165 LSB/uGy PASS A1417MCW ... 165 LSB/uGy PASS ,F1417MCW ... 165 LSB/uGy PASS

evidence.claim: Energy range testing passed for normal operation at 40 kVp and 150 kVp irradiation.
evidence.evidenceText: Energy range 40kvp, 150kvp 정상동작 40kvp / 150kvp로 조사시 영상획득되는지 확인. PASS

evidence.claim: A/D conversion passed; the ROIC board A/D conversion resolution is 16 bit and uses conversion to 14 bit by removing the lower 2 bits.
evidence.evidenceText: ROIC 보드의 A/D 변환 해상도는 16bit이며, 하위 2비트를 제거하여 14bit로 변환하여 사용하는 방식임.

evidence.claim: Wireless standard verification passed against IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac.
evidence.evidenceText: Wireless standard IEEE 802.11a/b/g/n/ac Wifi 모듈 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: The final IP rating was confirmed as IP56.
evidence.evidenceText: 이에 최종 IP 등급은 IP56 으로 확인하였습니다.

evidence.claim: Communication verification passed against 1Giga-bit Ethernet.
evidence.evidenceText: Communication 1Giga-bit Ethernet 사양서 확인 PASS

evidence.claim: Trigger mode verification passed for both line trigger mode and auto trigger mode.
evidence.evidenceText: Trigger mode Line trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS Auto trigger 모드 정상동작 ... PASS

evidence.claim: The conclusion states the HnX-R1 2/3G series performance setting values had no abnormality.
evidence.evidenceText: 해당 시험 결과를 통해 의료영상획득장치 (모델명: HnX-R1, 2/3G series)의 성능 설정값에 이상 없음을 확인하였다.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is explicitly stated in the source text; authoritySignal is present only in source metadata.
OCR/text quality issues appear in the source, including 'Digital Falt Panel X-ray Detector', 'DATASHHET', and repeated or inconsistent section numbering.
The IP range section states IP54 was satisfied under IEC 60601-1 and separately confirms final IP56 after IPX6 testing; extracted final rating follows the document's stated conclusion.
